zh: 你正在报道 2025 年北加州山火事件。雷击引发多点火情，强风推动火线向沿海扩散，部分 5 号公路路段封闭，至少两个社区收到撤离令。空气质量迅速恶化，急救热线通话量激增。社交媒体出现“化工仓库爆炸”的传闻，视频角落疑似出现“Redwood Storage”字样，但上传账号无地理信息且很快消失，发布时间被二次转发覆盖，尚无官方证实。官方简报与现场描述在撤离人数等细节上存在差异，数据随时间变化。你需要在时间压力下取证、核实、平衡官方数据与现场观察，避免放大未经核实的信息。目标是帮助读者理解火势、风险、救援与民生影响，并明确哪些信息仍待确认。
en: You are reporting on the 2025 Northern California wildfires. Lightning sparked multiple fires, strong winds pushed the firelines toward the coast, sections of Highway 5 closed, and at least two communities received evacuation orders. Air quality deteriorated rapidly and emergency hotlines saw a surge in calls. Social media spread a "chemical warehouse explosion" rumor; a clip appears to show the words "Redwood Storage" but the uploader lacks geotags and quickly disappeared, and the timestamp was obscured by re-shares. Officials have not confirmed the claim. Official briefings and on-the-ground accounts diverge on some details such as evacuee counts, and data changes over time. Under time pressure, you must verify facts, balance official data with observations, and avoid amplifying unverified claims. Your goal is to help readers understand the fire, risks, response efforts, and public impact while clearly stating what remains unconfirmed.
